description: CallFire provides communications APIs and tools for sending text messages, placing voice calls, running broadcasts, and managing phone numbers, contacts, and related telephony workflows. Its public developer docs focus on the v2 REST API and legacy API guidance.
summary: CallFire exposes a REST API v2 at `https://api.callfire.com/v2` documented on developers.callfire.com and authenticated with per-application Basic Auth credentials; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found.
